stemHtml: What is EASA's role regarding hard law and soft law?

options.a: EASA proposes hard law (Regulations, Implementing Acts, Delegated Acts) and publishes soft law (Acceptable Means of Compliance and Guidance Material).
options.b: EASA proposes hard law (AMC) and publishes soft law (Guidance Material).
options.c: EASA proposes hard law (Guidance Material) and publishes soft law (AMC).
options.d: EASA proposes hard law (AMC and GM) and publishes soft law (Regulations, Implementing Acts, Delegated Acts).
